messages.content:
Explain why accurate library version tracking is important in cybersecurity.

In Raptor RDF Syntax Library through 2.0.16, there is a heap-based buffer over-read when parsing triples with the nquads parser in raptor_ntriples_parse_term_internal().
Accurate library version tracking is crucial as it helps identify which versions contain vulnerabilities, ensuring proper patch management and minimizing security risks by deploying fixes promptly.
